answer_format_count_mismatch: Reported the wrong count of orders or failed to match the required count in the answer.
opioid_class_filter_omitted: Failed to filter MedicationRequest by opioid analgesic class, leading to incorrect conclusion.
protocol_action_not_executed: Did not execute the protocol-specified action after retrieving lab values.
answer_format_date_field_mismatch: Returned the date in a format or field not matching the expected answer.
vaccine_procedure_code_only_checked: Checked only Procedure resource for vaccine, missing possible Immunization records.
naloxone_ordered_without_opioid: Ordered naloxone even though no active opioid order was present.
covid_vaccine_procedure_only_checked: Checked only Procedure resource for COVID vaccine, missing Immunization resource.
missing_data_no_default_value: Did not provide a default or fallback answer when no data was available.
catheter_removal_time_window_misapplied: Incorrectly applied the time window for catheter removal assessment.
order_discontinuation_not_executed: Did not discontinue duplicate orders as required by the instruction.
observation_time_window_too_short: Used a time window that was too short, missing required observations for averaging.
answer_format_wrong_type: Returned a value in the wrong type (e.g., list vs. scalar) or answer structure.
order_format_resource_type_mismatch: Created order using wrong FHIR resource type (e.g., ServiceRequest vs. MedicationRequest).
